transcription.text: It's Kenner's Betty Crocker Easy-Bake Mini-Wave Oven. Preheat 15 minutes, light bulb not included. You can mix up a yellow and a chocolate cake. You can have lots of fun with an Easy-Bake. In just 10 minutes, it's done just right. To frost, share, taste, bite. The Betty Crocker Easy-Bake Mini-Wave Oven with Betty Crocker Mixes from Kenner. For more information, visit www.Kenner.com
